item.title: Guess Who
item.description: Fun fact, I was a counterterror targeter for the United States government. As well as an all Source intelligence analyst in the United States Army The majority of my time spent looking for bad guys here domestically was spent looking through white supremacist groups They are by far the largest problem that we have in this nation when it comes to domestic threats
item.dc:creator: SquaresNews

item.title: The Onion always been even more prescient than The Simpsons
item.dc:creator: PileOfWalthers

item.description:
I have been trying so hard because I need to lose weight. I have a couple different issues with my back. Facet Atrophy, basically progressive disease of the vertebrae. Caused from my back injury from my cousin when I was 11. He pushed me from a tree. Also a couple other issues but I've barely been managing. I'm just happy to be under 260 again.
Fuck ya, 19 more pounds before I can have surgery. Edit: I'm at work right now, I made this post between runs of getting cars. The joys of being a driver for a rental car agency. Y'all are fucking amazing and I appreciate it a lot. I've been working my ass off and trying to stay on a strict diet and it's been so hard. Edit 2: This post gained a lot of traction. I really appreciate all the support. It really does mean a lot and helps this gal out. It's been an incredibly difficult task. The last push is to get down to 175, that's my goal and I have to maintain a weight below 30 BMI in order to remove all this extra skin I have. Right now I'm scheduled to have bariatric surgery, I've done everything on the list for it beside the neurologist visit but that's because they can't get me in until March 2026. So I said fuck it and have been pushing myself harder to lose the weight without having the weight loss surgery. I still need the back surgery though and that's why I need to get below 240lbs by the New year, so I can have surgery to fix my damn back issues and hopefully walk without a cane anymore and have the other issues I have been experiencing, some of which are incredibly embarrassing. BUT THIS GAL IS NOT FUCKING GIVING UP. I WILL HIT 240LBS BEFORE THE NEW YEAR DAMNIT! Also where is the unit convert bot when you need them?
item.dc:creator: LustyLombax

item.dc:creator: wadeye

item.title: It's a terrible day for rain...
item.description: When I was young, my parents taught me to be kind and compassionate, to love my neighbors, to think for myself, and to stand up for what's right. In time we grew apart. They were religious and as I aged I became agnostic. Using the values they taught me I became left leaning while they watched Fox News. However, when a gunman showed up to his church today and started shooting, the first thing he did was get my nieces and nephews to safety. The next thing he did was run right back inside to save whoever else he could find. The gunman found my father, shot him, poured gasoline over his corpse and set him on fire. The only mercy being he was dead before the fire was lit. I know this because my sister was there as she had run back into the building with him to help. The gunman let her go after forcing her to swear she worshiped Jesus and not Joseph Smith three times. Whatever shortcomings my father may have had in life, in the end, when it mattered, he was the man I remembered as a child. He laid down his life for the people around him. Greater love hath no man than this. He lived up to his values as a Christian. He lived up to my dreams as a child who idolized his father. He lived up to the basic decency that seems so absent in this day and age. I couldn't be prouder of him. I'll miss you, Dad.
item.dc:creator: DrBlackJack

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
